user.title: Blaze PowerZone Connect
user.description: Connect to a Blaze PowerZone Connect amplifier. Enter the IP address of the amplifier.

zeroconf_confirm.description: A Blaze PowerZone Connect amplifier was found at {host} (Model: {model}). Would you like to add it?

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the amplifier.
